title: GEO: Generative Engine Optimization Guide for Local Businesses

metaDescription: Learn what GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) is and how to optimize for AI search. This guide explains how AI like ChatGPT and Google AI Overviews work and provides actionable steps for local businesses.
